title: Nursery Rhyme. DXLIII. Natural History.
content:
Cock Robin got up early,
            At the break of day,
        And went to Jenny's window,
            To sing a roundelay.

        He sang Cock Robin's love
            To the pretty Jenny Wren,
        And when he got unto the end,
            Then he began again.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DXLIII. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
